tips_en: Start with Paper 2 (ICWM). Its insight—repurposing the in-context window for system identification rather than behavior specification—is conceptually elegant and broadly transferable, and it backs the idea with both simulation (LIBERO) and real-robot (UR5e) evidence. A nice thread connects all three papers: each replaces a brittle cascaded pipeline with a unified mechanism—ICWM eliminates per-setup fine-tuning, OPID removes external skill libraries via on-policy hindsight extraction, and Wan-Streamer collapses VAD/ASR/TTS/video stacks into a single block-causal Transformer. Reading OPID next would be natural if you care about RL agents, since its critical-first routing and token-level self-distillation advantage complement ICWM's parameter-free adaptation theme.
tips_zh: 建议先读第二篇（ICWM）。其核心洞见——将上下文窗口用于“系统辨识”而非“行为指定”——概念上既优雅又具普适性，且论文同时给出了仿真（LIBERO）和真实机器人（UR5e）的实验支撑。三篇论文之间有一条清晰的共同主线：都用统一的机制取代脆弱的级联流水线——ICWM 消除了对每个新环境重新微调的需求，OPID 通过在线轨迹的事后提炼去掉了外部技能库，Wan-Streamer 则把 VAD/ASR/TTS/视频生成等模块压缩进单个块因果 Transformer。若你更关注强化学习智能体，可以接着读 OPID，其“关键优先路由”和 token 级自蒸馏优势设计与 ICWM “免参数适配”的理念相呼应。
